q.en: What is Ricardo's dilemma in the story?
q.zh: 故事中里卡多的两难处境是什么？

options.en: He secretly loves ballet but fears his friends will tease him
options.zh: 他偷偷热爱芭蕾，却担心朋友们会取笑他

options.en: He can't decide which team to join
options.zh: 他决定不了加入哪支球队

explain.en: Ricardo loves ballet but is afraid his friends will poke fun at him, so he keeps it a secret.
explain.zh: 里卡多热爱芭蕾，却害怕朋友们取笑他，所以一直保守着这个秘密。

q.en: Where does Mrs. Periwinkle take the class on the field trip?
q.zh: Periwinkle 老师带全班去校外教学的地方是哪里？

options.en: To the Opera House to see the ballet Cinderella
options.zh: 去歌剧院观看芭蕾舞剧《灰姑娘》

explain.en: Mrs. Periwinkle takes the class to the Opera House to see the ballet Cinderella and tour backstage.
explain.zh: Periwinkle 老师带全班去歌剧院观看芭蕾舞剧《灰姑娘》，并参观后台。

q.en: Why does Ricardo "roll his eyes" when his mother talks about the ballet?
q.zh: 当妈妈谈论芭蕾时，里卡多为什么"翻白眼"？

options.en: He is excited about the show
He would rather be playing soccer and isn't interested in ballet
options.zh: 他更想踢足球，对芭蕾并不感兴趣

explain.en: Ricardo is focused on his soccer playoff and is not excited about ballet, so he rolls his eyes.
explain.zh: 里卡多满心想着足球季后赛，对芭蕾没兴趣，所以翻了白眼。

q.en: How often did Ricardo go to ballet class during the playoffs?
q.zh: 在季后赛期间，里卡多多久去上一次芭蕾课？

explain.en: The book says he managed to make it to ballet class three nights a week during the playoffs.
explain.zh: 书中说他设法在季后赛期间每周三个晚上去上芭蕾课。

q.en: Which was one of Ricardo's reasons for wanting to learn ballet?
q.zh: 以下哪一个是里卡多想学芭蕾的理由之一？

options.en: Only girls are allowed to take it
It would make him quit soccer
options.zh: 学芭蕾会让他退出足球

options.en: It is required by his school

explain.en: Ricardo's list of reasons included that ballet is great exercise and that men worldwide dance ballet.
explain.zh: 里卡多列出的理由包括：芭蕾是很好的锻炼，而且全世界都有男性跳芭蕾。

q.en: What danger happens at the zoo?
q.zh: 在动物园里发生了什么危险的事？

options.en: A baby is flung toward the crocodiles by a teeter-totter
options.zh: 一个婴儿被跷跷板弹向了鳄鱼

explain.en: A child jumped on a teeter-totter and launched a baby through the air toward the crocodiles.
explain.zh: 一个小孩跳上跷跷板，把一个婴儿弹向了空中，直冲鳄鱼而去。

q.en: How does Ricardo save the baby?
q.zh: 里卡多是怎样救下婴儿的？

options.en: He asks a zookeeper for help
options.zh: 他向动物园管理员求助

options.en: He uses a grand split leap he learned in ballet
options.zh: 他使出了在芭蕾课上学的大跳劈叉

explain.en: Ricardo put his ballet training to the test and leaped in a marvelous grand split to snatch the baby.
explain.zh: 里卡多把芭蕾训练派上用场，以一个漂亮的大跳劈叉腾空抓住了婴儿。

q.zh: 里卡多救下的是谁家的婴儿？

explain.en: The man with bushy hair is called "Mr. Mayor," and the baby is his daughter, saved from the crocodiles.
explain.zh: 那个头发浓密的男人被称为"市长先生"，那个婴儿就是他的女儿，被从鳄鱼口中救下。

q.en: What message does the author seem to share through this story?
q.zh: 作者通过这个故事似乎想传达什么信息？

options.en: Soccer is more important than ballet
It's good to be true to yourself even if others might tease you
options.zh: 即使别人可能取笑你，也要做真实的自己

explain.en: Ricardo is happy he no longer hides his love of ballet, and no one makes fun of him—showing it's okay to be yourself.
explain.zh: 里卡多很高兴自己不再隐藏对芭蕾的热爱，也没人取笑他——说明做真实的自己是正确的。

q.en: How do Ricardo's friends react in the end?
q.zh: 最后里卡多的朋友们是什么反应？

options.en: No one ever makes fun of his love of dance
options.zh: 没有人再取笑他对舞蹈的热爱

explain.en: After the baby rescue, the secret is out and "no one ever made fun of his love of dance."
explain.zh: 救婴事件后，秘密公开了，而且"没有人再取笑他对舞蹈的热爱"。

prompt.en: Tell about a time you were unsure about trying something new because you worried what others might think. What happened?
prompt.zh: 讲讲你曾经因为担心别人怎么看而不敢尝试新事物的经历。后来发生了什么？

en: Name the activity and who you were afraid would judge you.
Explain how the situation turned out, like Ricardo's surprise ending.
zh: 说出那项活动，以及你怕谁会评判你。
像里卡多出人意料的结局一样，说明事情最后如何发展。
